service.reviewsTitle: Import, Export & Customs Clearance — Everything You Need, All in One Place
service.banner1Title: Order Worldwide with Pacred — Anywhere, Anytime
service.banner1Bullet1: End-to-end care from order to import
service.banner2Bullet3: Any checkpoint — we clear it all
service.aboutPara1L: Pacred Shipping — your end-to-end import-export and customs clearance specialist with over 14 years of experience. We handle every step from sourcing to delivery, all in one place. Whether you're sourcing from China or anywhere worldwide — 1688, Taobao, Tmall — we provide secure payment-transfer service with the best rates and full transparency.
service.aboutPara2L: If you already have goods to sell, whether you're an individual, a registered business, or an enterprise, we help you expand to overseas markets with full distributor and export services — managing documentation, logistics, and every step of the process for you.
service.aboutPara1R: On top of that, we have a professional Chinese-language interpreter team to help you contact, negotiate, and close deals with factories — free of charge. We cut your sourcing costs and guarantee the best prices, plus full Door-to-Door import service covering every step from sourcing, ordering, shipping, to customs clearance and final delivery.
service.aboutPara2R: Pacred is committed to service that's "fast, sharp, and never says 'can't be done'" — every step of the way. With a professional team of 14+ years of experience in import, export, customs clearance, and purchasing, we're ready to solve every problem for you.
service.feature1Desc: 1688, Taobao, Alibaba, Tmall — whatever store you order from, we verify and close every deal, with delivery guaranteed.
service.feature2Desc: Whether FCL, LCL, import-export, customs clearance, or stuck cargo — our quality team handles every step end-to-end with 14+ years of experience. Fast, sharp, never says 'can't be done'.
service.feature3Title: QC at Every Step — Quality Guaranteed
service.feature3Desc: Trust us — whether you're a small SME, mid-size, or large enterprise, we provide QC service at the warehouse to guarantee product quality.
service.feature4Desc: Slow imports? Cargo stuck at customs? Whatever the issue, we clear it — fast and decisive. Never 'can't be done'.
service.feature5Desc: Import with us today and get flat-rate ฿50 delivery across Bangkok and surrounding areas.
service.feature6Desc: Crystal-clear costs — every customer gets an SMS notification on every payment.

lineSettings.errImpersonation: Cannot change this while signed in as a customer (view-as-customer mode).
lineSettings.eolNote: Note: this replaces the legacy LINE Notify integration (the service ended 31 Mar 2025). Pacred now pushes notifications via the Pacred LINE OA you added as a friend.

tos.title: Accept terms before continuing
tos.intro: By using Pacred services (import-export / shipping / customs clearance / China shopping cart), you agree to the following terms:
tos.item1: Registration data must be truthful — false data may result in account suspension.
tos.item2: Payments via the system must include valid transfer evidence within the stated time window.
tos.item3: Illegal / counterfeit / hazardous goods may be refused at our sole discretion.
tos.item4: Refunds and returns follow our published policy.
tos.item5: We reserve the right to amend these terms — new versions require fresh acceptance.
tos.fullTextLink: Full text at <link>/terms</link> — full version will be uploaded in Phase H (rebrand).
tos.agreeLabel: I have read and accept Pacred's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

pricing.termDdpDesc: Full service: freight + customs + tax, delivered to destination
pricing.cargoNoticeDesc: Every shipment ships with proper docs, correct taxes, transparent and verifiable.
pricing.yiwuNote: China's largest small-commodity market — souvenirs, gifts, stationery, toys, home decor, party supplies, mom & baby.
pricing.guangzhouNote: South China's biggest fashion hub — clothing, shoes, bags, leather goods, cosmetics, accessories, auto parts.
pricing.shenzhenNote: China's technology hub — phones, computers, gadgets, drones, cameras, electronics & IT components.
pricing.lclSectionSub: Mid-volume — pay by CBM or kg, all-in DDP with customs cleared.
pricing.fclSectionSub: 20ft / 40HQ container — lowest per-unit cost, ideal for high volume.
pricing.lclNote: Best for small volumes that don't fill a container — shared shipments.
pricing.lclTruckNote: Best for urgent goods — door-to-door DDP from China to Thailand in 5-7 days.
pricing.lclSeaSubtitle: Sea freight from China · best value
pricing.lclSeaNote: Lowest freight cost, taxes & customs included. Best for non-urgent goods.
pricing.fcl20Note: Best for heavy goods at medium volume — most cost-effective per CBM.
pricing.fcl40Note: Best for large volumes — fully packed at lowest cost per unit.
pricing.footnote: * Starting rates per unit and may vary by product type, volume, and season — contact us, you may get a better rate than listed.
pricing.cargoLclSectionSub: Priced per CBM / kg — ideal for small to medium shipments, shared with other customers, DDP inclusive
pricing.cargoFclSectionSub: Dedicated container — more economical than LCL for shipments exceeding 10 CBM
pricing.cargoFcl20Note: Beats LCL cost once you exceed 10 CBM — fixed price, simple budgeting, door-to-door DDP
pricing.cargoFcl40Note: Best value for 25+ CBM — maximum space, lowest cost per unit, full team support

whyPacred.titlePart1: Import, export, stuck-at-customs — whichever port, whichever term,
whyPacred.subtitle: China sourcing · QC · FCL/LCL freight · tax clearance · stuck-at-customs — Pacred Shipping handles it all, end to end.
whyPacred.f1Sub: 1688, Taobao, Alibaba, Tmall — we'll check them for you
whyPacred.f1Desc: No matter which shop you're buying from, we verify the seller, inspect the goods, coordinate, and close the deal — guaranteed delivery to your door.
whyPacred.f2Sub: Quality team with 14+ years of experience
whyPacred.f2Desc: FCL, LCL, import & export, customs and tax clearance, stuck-at-customs — our team handles every step. Fast, sharp, and we never say "can't be done".
whyPacred.f3Title: QC at every step — quality guaranteed
whyPacred.f3Sub: Inspect goods at the origin warehouse
whyPacred.f3Desc: Trusted by everyone from small SMEs to large enterprises. QC service at the warehouse guarantees quality before every shipment.
whyPacred.f4Sub: Fast, sharp — we never say "can't be done"
whyPacred.f4Desc: Late imports, goods stuck at customs — whatever the problem, Pacred Shipping handles it quickly and systematically.
whyPacred.f5Desc: Import with us today and enjoy flat-rate delivery from just 100 THB across Bangkok and nearby provinces — easier cost planning and savings.
whyPacred.f6Desc: Get SMS alerts for every payment — less confusion, transparent verifiable expenses on every bill and order.
whyPacred.articleP1Body1: brings the experience of an import & export specialist and full-service customs clearance for more than
whyPacred.articleP1Body2: , caring for you from upstream to downstream, finished in one place. If you need to buy products from China or anywhere worldwide —
whyPacred.articleP1Body3: — we're ready to handle your supplier payments safely, at great rates, transparent and verifiable.
whyPacred.articleP2Body1: On top of that, we have a professional Chinese interpreter team to contact, negotiate, and close factory deals for free — helping you cut your product cost. We'll get you the best price guaranteed, with full
whyPacred.articleP2Body2: import service, all steps included: sourcing, ordering, freight, customs clearance, and delivery to your hand.
whyPacred.articleP3: For those who already have goods — whether you're an individual, juristic person, or business owner — we can help you expand your market with our dealer and export service abroad. We handle all paperwork, logistics, and procedures end-to-end.
whyPacred.articleP4Prefix: Pacred focuses on service that is
whyPacred.articleP4Suffix: at every step, with a professional team of 14+ years experience — import, export, clearance, sourcing — we wrap up every problem for you.
whyPacred.articleP5Body1: Whether you're importing from China or exporting worldwide, ordering, sending money, or expanding your business abroad — let
whyPacred.articleP5Body2: take care of it, and you'll understand the meaning of

homeArticle.subheading: End-to-end shipping the professional way — Pacred Shipping handles every step, from origin to last mile.
homeArticle.introBody1: Open the door to professional shipping with
homeArticle.introBody2: — full customs clearance, end-to-end, with over
homeArticle.p2Body1: On top of that, our in-house Chinese-speaking team negotiates directly with factories — closing deals for you at the best price, free of charge. Door-to-door imports are handled completely, from sourcing to
homeArticle.p2Body2: delivery — sourcing, ordering, freight, and finally
homeArticle.p3Body1: Already have goods? Whether you're an individual, a company, or an SME, we help expand your market — including
homeArticle.p3Body2: with full paperwork, logistics and lifecycle management.
homeArticle.quoteIntro: Pacred is built on the promise of
homeArticle.quoteOutro: service end-to-end — import, export, clearance, shop-order — we close every problem.
homeArticle.marketplacesSub: Coverage across every popular platform — from wholesale 1688 to retail Taobao and Tmall — Pacred handles all of it.
homeArticle.categoriesSub: Whatever you're importing, we've already done it.
homeArticle.portsSub: Every port in Thailand — airports, seaports, ICD, mail, border crossings — plus TFDA, TISI, agriculture and fisheries permits.
homeArticle.warehousesSub: Two origin hubs in China (Guangzhou · Yiwu) plus a Thailand destination — receive and distribute at every step.
homeArticle.warehouseGuangzhouDesc: South China commerce hub. Receives from 1688 and Tmall factories.
homeArticle.warehouseYiwuDesc: World's largest small-commodity market — ideal for gifts and homeware.
homeArticle.warehouseThailandDesc: Om Noi destination hub. Last-mile distribution nationwide.

root.title: Pacred — Import · Export · Shipping · Customs Clearance
root.description: Pacred — end-to-end import & export, customs clearance, FCL/LCL shipping by road, sea and air, and China shop-order. One platform.

home.title: Pacred Shipping — 14 Years of Import, Export & Customs Clearance
home.description: Import from China (1688 / Taobao / Tmall), export worldwide, customs clearance, FCL/LCL by road, sea and air — Pacred Shipping delivers door to door.

index.title: Import, Export & Customs Clearance Services
index.description: Pacred Shipping services — China import (FCL/LCL), worldwide export, customs clearance, and 1688/Taobao/Tmall shop-order. All in one place.

importChina.title: Import from China
importChina.description: Import from China — 1688, Taobao, Tmall · FCL · LCL · door-to-door · cleared across every Incoterm and port by Pacred Shipping.

importChinaFcl.title: Import FCL from China
importChinaFcl.description: Full-container imports from China — 20'/40' containers from factory, cleared under EXW/FOB/CIF/DDP by Pacred Shipping.

importChinaLcl.title: Import LCL from China
importChinaLcl.description: Less-than-container imports from China — consolidated freight at lower cost, door-to-door by Pacred Shipping.

customsClearance.title: Customs Clearance · Stuck-at-Customs Recovery
customsClearance.description: Customs clearance under every Incoterm and port, including stuck-at-customs recovery — road, sea, air. 14 years with Pacred Shipping.

exportWorldwide.title: Worldwide Export
exportWorldwide.description: Export from Thailand worldwide — air/sea freight, FCL/LCL, customs export, fumigation. Full paperwork by Pacred Shipping.

chinaShopping.title: China Shop-Order · Yuan Transfer
chinaShopping.description: Shop on 1688 · Taobao · Tmall · Alibaba with Chinese-speaking buyers and safe Yuan transfers via Alipay through Pacred Shipping.

yuanTransfer.title: Yuan Transfer · Pay Chinese Suppliers · Alipay/WeChat
yuanTransfer.description: Pay Chinese suppliers in Yuan — Alipay, WeChat Pay, China bank transfer. Best rate, 1-2 hours turnaround, supports 1688/Taobao/Tmall by Pacred Shipping.

index.title: Pacred Warehouses — China · Thailand
index.description: Pacred Shipping warehouses across Asia — Guangzhou, Yiwu, and Thailand, receiving from every marketplace.

china.title: China Warehouses · Guangzhou + Yiwu
china.description: Pacred Shipping origin warehouses in China — Guangzhou and Yiwu, receiving from 1688, Taobao, Tmall, Alibaba.

guangzhou.title: Guangzhou Warehouse
guangzhou.description: Pacred's Guangzhou hub — receives factory and online orders from every major Chinese marketplace.

yiwu.title: Yiwu Warehouse
yiwu.description: Pacred's Yiwu hub — the world's biggest small-commodity market, ideal for gifts, toys, stationery and homeware.

thailand.title: Thailand Warehouse · Pacred HQ
thailand.description: Pacred's Thailand warehouse — destination hub and door-to-door delivery across the country.

index.title: Knowledge Base · Import, Export & Customs
index.description: In-depth Pacred Shipping articles — China imports, CIF/FOB/EXW Incoterms, customs clearance, permits, and how to reduce risk.

index.title: Pacred News · Announcements & Service Updates
index.description: Follow announcements from Pacred Shipping — shipping measures, service updates, and company activities.

index.title: Pacred Customer Reviews · China FCL/LCL Import + Customs Clearance
index.description: Real customer reviews of Pacred Shipping — China imports by full-container FCL and consolidated LCL, plus customs clearance by road, sea, and air across DDP/CIF terms.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: FAQ for Pacred Shipping — import, export, customs clearance, shop-order, Yuan transfer, fees, and more.

about.title: About Pacred Shipping
about.description: Pacred Shipping is a full-service import, export and customs-clearance partner with 14 years of experience, from upstream to last mile.

contact.title: Contact Pacred Shipping
contact.description: Reach Pacred Shipping — LINE OA, phone 066-131-0253, email contact@pacred.co. Fast replies on every channel.

booking.title: Calculate Shipping · Book Now
booking.description: Estimate China-Thailand shipping costs in seconds — enter your volume and weight, get an instant quote, and book with Pacred Shipping.

alipay.title: How to Pay via Alipay
alipay.description: Pacred Shipping's Alipay payment guide — safe Yuan transfers at fair market rates with real-time confirmation.

p1688.title: How to Pay on 1688
p1688.description: Pay 1688 suppliers through Pacred Shipping — fast, safe, and fully traceable.

taobao.title: How to Pay on Taobao
taobao.description: Pay Taobao sellers through Pacred Shipping — simple workflow, transparent market rates.

howToUse.title: How to Use Pacred Shipping
howToUse.description: Step-by-step guide to using Pacred Shipping — import, export, customs, shop-order and Yuan transfer. Get started in minutes.

deliveryAreas.title: Delivery Coverage & Pricing
deliveryAreas.description: Check Pacred Shipping's delivery zones — nationwide Thailand, Bangkok, suburbs, and provincial coverage.

holidays.title: Service Calendar · Holidays
holidays.description: Pacred Shipping holiday calendar — annual holidays, customs closures, and service availability.

joinUs.title: Join Pacred Shipping
joinUs.description: Pacred is hiring — build the future of full-service shipping with a team that grows together.

terms.title: Terms of Service

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Pacred Shipping respects your privacy — read how we collect and process personal information.

walletDeposit.withdrawCondition1: You may withdraw only if you have previously paid for a Pacred shop-order or import service
walletDeposit.withdrawCondition2: Withdrawals require a copy of your ID card and bank book cover
walletDeposit.withdrawCondition3: The minimum withdrawal amount is 25 THB
walletDeposit.withdrawCondition4: Withdrawals under 500 THB incur a 25 THB fee per transaction
walletDeposit.withdrawCondition5: Processing takes 7-10 business days (excluding public holidays and Sundays), as we must verify the details and amount to coordinate with the bank
walletDeposit.withdrawCondition6: The company reserves the right to change this policy under its own terms
